description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof adorned with a geometric pattern of dark glass or solar panels. The exterior is clad in vertical wooden slats, giving it a contemporary yet natural appearance. The front facade includes large, floor-to-ceiling glass windows and a sliding door, allowing ample natural light into the interior. On one side, there is a solid door, likely serving as the main entrance, while the opposite side is windowless, emphasizing privacy. The rear of the bungalow is simple, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The structure sits on a low concrete base, suggesting stability and durability suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with vertical wooden cladding, large glass windows, and a geometric patterned roof, set on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows and a sliding door framed by vertical wooden slats.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a solid entrance door and the continuation of the wooden cladding.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wooden facade and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with two large glass windows, mirroring the front's openness.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
